payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Narrow vertical crop of the left edge of a cream-painted wooden picture frame with a simple molded profile and minor scuffing; interior reveals a sliver of the framed seaside painting (blue sky and sandy tones). The frame is partially visible and edge-cropped, photographed at close range (approx. 0.5 m).
attributes: sliver of seaside painting visible (blue sky, sand)
